race.comment: MISS JENNIFER (1) back sharply in class and she gets a much better set-up for this with the claim. Never handled the synthetic track with a poor tenth over 1280m at Canberra Acton. Adept in all going and can return to form quickly. SHE CONQUERS (8) smart fresh mare primed for this with the two sharp trials. Never came up last prep when a poor sixth over 1250m at Randwick Kensington last December. Can sit off the good speed and launch late with the blinkers going on. REMADOSI (10) resumes after winning two-in-a-row last prep over 1400m. Savaged the line with a narrow second over 1600m at Canberra in BM75 class last March. Proven fresh with the 2kg claim. Leading player. HELLINDA (6) class runner of the field poorly drawn for this. Finds an easier race and place prospects look best.
